In [1]:
import cv2
import numpy as np
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt
In [3]:
img = cv2.imread("baby.jpg")
cv2.imshow("Image",img)
cv2.waitKey(0)
Out[3]:
-1

Sobel(src,ddepth, dx, dy)¶

In [4]:
grayImag = cv2.cvtColor(img,cv2.COLOR_BGR2GRAY)
cv2.imshow('boy', grayImag)
cv2.waitKey(0)
Out[4]:
-1
In [5]:
img_blur = cv2.GaussianBlur(grayImag,(3,3),sigmaX=0,sigmaY=0)
In [6]:
sobx = cv2.Sobel(grayImag,cv2.CV_16S,dx=1,dy=0)
soby = cv2.Sobel(grayImag,cv2.CV_16S,dx=0,dy=1)
grad = cv2.Sobel(grayImag,cv2.CV_16S,dx=1,dy=1)
In [7]:
absX = cv2.convertScaleAbs(sobx)
absY = cv2.convertScaleAbs(soby)
absgrad = cv2.addWeighted(absX,0.5,absY ,0.5,0)
In [8]:
cv2.imshow('name_of_window', absX)
cv2.waitKey(0)
cv2.imshow('name_of_window', absY)
cv2.waitKey(0)
cv2.imshow('name_of_window', absgrad)
cv2.waitKey(0)
Out[8]:
-1
In [9]:
plt.imshow(absgrad,cmap=plt.cm.gray)
plt.show()
In [ ]:
In [34]:
plt.imshow(absgrad,cmap=plt.cm.gray)
plt.show()
In [10]:
sobx = cv2.Sobel(img_blur,cv2.CV_16S,dx=1,dy=0)
soby = cv2.Sobel(img_blur,cv2.CV_16S,dx=0,dy=1)
grad = cv2.Sobel(img_blur,cv2.CV_16S,dx=1,dy=1)

absX = cv2.convertScaleAbs(sobx)
absY = cv2.convertScaleAbs(soby)
absgrad = cv2.addWeighted(absX,0.5,absY ,0.5,0)
In [59]:
plt.imshow(absgrad,cmap=plt.cm.gray)
plt.show()

Canny(image, threshold1, threshold2)¶

In [60]:
img_blur = cv2.GaussianBlur(grayImag,(3,3),sigmaX=0,sigmaY=0)
In [61]:
edges = cv2.Canny(grayImag,100,200)

plt.subplot(121),plt.imshow(grayImag,cmap = 'gray')
plt.title('Original Image'), plt.xticks([]), plt.yticks([])
plt.subplot(122),plt.imshow(edges,cmap = 'gray')
plt.title('Edge Image'), plt.xticks([]), plt.yticks([])
plt.show()
In [63]:
edges = cv2.Canny(img_blur,100,200)

plt.subplot(121),plt.imshow(grayImag,cmap = 'gray')
plt.title('Original Image'), plt.xticks([]), plt.yticks([])
plt.subplot(122),plt.imshow(edges,cmap = 'gray')
plt.title('Edge Image'), plt.xticks([]), plt.yticks([])
plt.show()
In [ ]:

Лапласиан¶

In [66]:
plt.imshow(grayImag,cmap=plt.cm.gray)
plt.show()
In [68]:
dst = cv2.Laplacian(grayImag,cv2.CV_16S,ksize=3)
Lap = cv2.convertScaleAbs(dst)
In [69]:
plt.subplot(121),plt.imshow(grayImag,cmap = 'gray')
plt.title('Original Image'), plt.xticks([]), plt.yticks([])
plt.subplot(122),plt.imshow(Lap,cmap = 'gray')
plt.title('Edge Image'), plt.xticks([]), plt.yticks([])
plt.show()
